{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040155CAE5B092BBFD65F7057C"}"},"total":4317},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401053866014442264","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评，必须好评。作者的文笔肯定是有的。而且不低。整个文章的布局也是非常的别出心裁。起码跟市面上的套路不一样。同时也是一本没有毒点的小说，我个人认为没有。当然也不能说没有。只能说作者的行笔很流畅，可以迅速转跳，不像其他的小说。挖了一个坑，迟迟不埋，这里指的是10张到50章以内。当然也不能说是全部埋开，但起码都要解释，让读者有一种心情很好的感觉。综上，我个人认为这本书是番茄里面不可多得的好书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723194811,"group_id":"7385271736305994777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"精神的世界才是我所向往的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwmI4b1Q2VlwCSHDOaTErkI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a2020d22cd1c40f190b342a2859d7712~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794086&x-signature=7QH8M0hD87C5HaeAOAFW%2FwvarBE%3D","user_id":"544967460129712","user_name":" 筱笙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"544967460129712","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385271736305994777","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局无敌+战力天花板+皇朝大帝+大佬】
  陆辰穿越转世了，这一世的他是大虞皇朝的五皇子，并拥有了恐怖的悟性与根骨。
  当别人还在为突破青天不易诀第九层烦恼时，他早已将功法进一步推演，达到了前无古人后无来者的第十一层。
  当别人还在为突破武道天人而挣扎时，他早已水到渠成踏破天人桎梏，晋升陆地神仙。
  于是，就这样，潜修二十年的他，不知不觉竟已天下无敌！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d13e37deedad2f0a31707083902423b5","author":"七月飞星","author_id":"","book_id":"7385271736305994777","book_name":"天赋拉满，我在武道世界显圣！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385271944502837785","read_count":"77986","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000106"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"434","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,无敌,开局,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/77473f1406770d4057c431670bb9b65b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393715&x-signature=jzjGgWw9YKBzlUr3Er4tngPVfi8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"378688552318359","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040155CAE5B092BBFD65F7057C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"liste 前期是纯爽文，文笔还不错，看着纯爽。
中期反派头子现身之后开始越来越精彩，开始走向悬疑，动脑的方向。前期埋的伏笔也开始揭开。主线明确，逻辑合理，是一个本可以细读的好书。
我看得时候评分9分，但我觉得这个分还可以高，拿终焉来比，脑洞度不如终焉，但爽度超过终焉，毕竟主角一直开头无敌到结尾。终焉9.9，这本给个9.8吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766150766,"group_id":"7385271736305994777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你永远叫不醒一个装睡的人。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N437WUjnmPs0wUucpQSgzlA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/28f24dcc7673420f88d2eaa128c2e4c4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792784&x-signature=sO5MNWplENMmniZ6s74Vls3hV2Q%3D","user_id":"105518679368","user_name":""苏婉清…"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105518679368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385271736305994777","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局无敌+战力天花板+皇朝大帝+大佬】
